text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I continue to train with Sakura Bakushin O for her
next race. One day, some good news comes
knocking on the door.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She was selected for "The Year's Notable
Umamusume." I immediately go looking for her to
share the news...

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text: You're just amazing, Bakushin O!

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text:
To have your name in a magazine with that much
influence, only you could do it! Speed really pays
off, huh?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Heheh, I know, right?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Of course I, your very talented class
representative, would have your hearts bursting
with emotion!

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text: I wouldn't take it that far...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like she's having a good time with her
classmates. I'll talk to her later...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! Hello there!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You've come at just the right time! I'm currently
being swamped with compliments!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Nothing less for someone as talented as I! Don't
feel shy to join in on the fun!
choice_data_list: What were you being complimented on?
What were you being complimented on?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Well, you see!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wait, what was it again?!

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text:
You got selected by a magazine for their special
feature, "The Year's Notable Umamusume"...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: No way!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
How splendid! Those media people really have a
good eye for things!

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text: We just told you...

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text:
You know that's how she is. Trainer, we'll leave
the rest to you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her classmates vanish just like that. I think I've
got an idea of what her usual days in the
classroom are like now.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Looks like the world's catching up to my Bakushin
speed!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Please, allow me to see that magazine at onc—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Where is everyone?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I see! Then I must go looking for it myself!
choice_data_list: I've got a copy in my office.
I've got a copy in my office.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain to Sakura Bakushin O that this magazine
feature is why I came looking for her.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I see! Then let us depart for your office!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However, her good mood doesn't last very long...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Grrr!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: What. Is. This?! I invoke my title as class representative and object to this information!
choice_data_list:
I think they've written quite nice things about
you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The selection was based on the vote of a few
well-renowned reporters. They were singing
nothing but praise for Sakura Bakushin O...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: No, no! You are forgetting a very important thing!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Just why did they put my name in the "Sprint Division"?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: It says here, "The People's Favorite Sprinter "... The media has lost their marbles! No, they've lost the whole pool!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Are you listening? I am not an Umamusume to be
sorted into a little category like "sprinter"!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
And you know why?! Because I'm class
representative!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Why must I be confined to a category so small...
It's frustrating!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Let's definitely, definitely win the Classics this year! That'll show them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...It looks like the reporters' fervent praise only
makes Sakura Bakushin O more competitive.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I want nothing more than for her to win the
Classics, but even if she moves away from sprints,
it wouldn't do much to help matters.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I've got to convince Sakura Bakushin O to
change her mind, no matter the cost!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Tell me, what is it!
choice_data_list:
Shall we wait for your results in the Spring
Stakes?

Shall we wait for your results in the Spring
Stakes?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hm? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O is an Umamusume who's
confident she'll win any race she sets her mind to.
I find that amazing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she still has a ways to go. Depending on
the results of the Spring Stakes, we may have to
review our training methods.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It might mean concentrating on running shorter
distances this year to work on that exceptional
speed of hers. Or so I explain...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
So you mean there's a possibility I can't run in the
Classics this year?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Wouldn't that mean careening off of the Bakushin
Road?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
choice_data_list: All of this is for the Arima Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whoa! I'm not really sure what you mean,
but—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: You sounded kind of cool there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I think I've gotten the hang of handling, or
should I say, guiding her.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I understand... Let's make a promise! I trust you to
keep it.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
If I happen to lose, then I will focus on sprint
training.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: But only if it'll bring me closer to my future goals!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...It will bring her closer to her future, that's for sure. In any case, this is one way of convincing her to stick with sprint training.
